name: parc-ferme-store
description: Parc Fermé — flagship demo F1 memorabilia store for API security demos

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.test: npm test --prefix server && npm test --prefix client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix client
